channel.title: ConfigMaps on Kunal Kushwaha
channel.description: Recent content in ConfigMaps on Kunal Kushwaha

item.title: ConfigMaps and Pods
item.description: A Pod is collection of containers running in shared namespace. A container is created from Docker/OCI Image, which is immutable in nature i.e. data bundled into the image cannot be changed later in image.

item.title: ConfigMaps, Secrets and Pods
item.description: A Pod is collection of containers running is shared namespace. A container is created from Docker/OCI Image, which is immutable in nature i.e. data bundled into image cannot be changed later in image.
